text: Ḥā, Meem.
tl: Haa-Meeeem

text: The revelation of the Book is from Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
tl: Tanzeelul Kitaabi minal laahil 'Azeezil Hakeem

text: We did not create the heavens and earth and what is between them except in truth and [for] a specified term. But those who disbelieve, from that of which they are warned, are turning away.
tl: Maa khalaqnas samaawaati wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaaa illaa bilhaqqi Wa-ajalim musammaa; wallazeena kafaroo 'ammaaa unziroo mu'ridoon

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"Have you considered that which you invoke besides Allāh? Show me what they have created of the earth; or did they have partnership in [creation of] the heavens? Bring me a scripture [revealed] before this or a [remaining] trace of knowledge, if you should be truthful.\"
tl: Qul ara'aytum maa tad'oona min doonil laahi aroonee maazaa khalaqoo minal ardi am lahum shirkun fis samaawaati eetoonee bi-kitaabim min qabli haazaaa aw asaaratim min 'ilmin in kuntum saadiqeen

text: And who is more astray than he who invokes besides Allāh those who will not respond to him until the Day of Resurrection [i.e., never], and they, of their invocation, are unaware.
tl: Wa-man adallu mimmaien yad'oo min doonil laahi mal laa yastajeebu lahooo ilaa Yawmil Qiyaamati Wa-hum 'an du'aaa'ihim ghaafiloon

text: And when the people are gathered [that Day], they [who were invoked] will be enemies to them, and they will be deniers of their worship.
tl: Wa-izaa hushiran naasu kaanoo lahum a'daaa'anw Wa-kaanoo bi'ibaadatihim kaafireen

text: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say of the truth when it has come to them, \"This is obvious magic.\"
tl: Wa-izaa tutlaa 'alaihim Aayaatunaa baiyinaatin qaalal lazeena kafaroo lilhaqqi lammaa jaaa'ahum haazaa sihrum mubeen

text: Or do they say, \"He has invented it\"? Say, \"If I have invented it, you will not possess for me [the power of protection] from Allāh at all. He is most knowing of that in which you are involved. Sufficient is He as Witness between me and you, and He is the Forgiving, the Merciful.\"
tl: Am yaqooloonaf taraahu qul inif taraituhoo falaa tamlikoona lee minal laahi shai'an Huwa a'lamu bimaa tufeedoona feehi kafaa bihee shaheedam bainee Wa-bainakum Wa-Huwal Ghafoorur Raheem

text: Say, \"I am not something new among the messengers, nor do I know what will be done with me or with you. I only follow that which is revealed to me, and I am not but a clear warner.\"
tl: Qul maa kuntu bid'am minal Rusuli Wa-maaa adreee ma yuf'alu bee Wa-laa bikum in attabi'u illaa maa yoohaaa ilaiya Wa-maaa ana illaa nazeerum mubeen

text: Say, \"Have you considered: if it [i.e., the Qur’ān] was from Allāh, and you disbelieved in it while a witness from the Children of Israel has testified to something similar and believed while you were arrogant...?\" Indeed, Allāh does not guide the wrongdoing people.
tl: Qul ara'aytum in kaana min 'indil laahi Wa-kafartum bihee Wa-shahida shaahidum mim Banee Israaa'eela 'alaa mislihee fa-aamana wastak-bartum innal laaha laa yahdil qawmaz zaalimeen

text: And those who disbelieve say of those who believe, \"If it had [truly] been good, they would not have preceded us to it.\" And when they are not guided by it, they will say, \"This is an ancient falsehood.\"
tl: Wa-qaalal lazeena kafaroo lillazeena aamanoo law kaana khairam maa sabaqoonaaa ilyh; Wa-iz lam yahtadoo bihee fasa-yaqooloona haazaaa ifkun qadeem

text: And before it was the scripture of Moses to lead and as a mercy. And this is a confirming Book in an Arabic tongue to warn those who have wronged and as good tidings to the doers of good.
tl: Wa-min qablihee kitaabu Moosaaa imaamanw wa-rahmah; Wa-haazaa Kitaabum musad-diqul lisaanan 'Arabiyyal liyunziral lazeena zalamoo Wa-bushraa lilmuhsineen

text: Indeed, those who have said, \"Our Lord is Allāh,\" and then remained on a right course - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.
tl: Innal lazeena qaaloo Rabbunal laahu summas taqaamoo falaa khawfun 'alaihim Wa-laa hum yahzanoon

text: Those are the companions of Paradise, abiding eternally therein as reward for what they used to do.
tl: Ulaaa'ika Ashabul Jannati khaalideena feehaa jazaaa'am bimaa kaano ya'maloon

text: And We have enjoined upon man, to his parents, good treatment. His mother carried him with hardship and gave birth to him with hardship, and his gestation and weaning [period] is thirty months. [He grows] until, when he reaches maturity and reaches [the age of] forty years, he says, \"My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to work righteousness of which You will approve and make righteous for me my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed, I am of the Muslims.\"
tl: Wa-wassainal insaana biwaalidaihi ihsaana; hamalat-hu ummuhoo kurhanwn wa-wada'at-hu kurhanw Wa-hamluhoo Wa-fisaaluhoo salaasoona shahraa; hattaaa izaa balagha ashuddahoo Wa-balagha arba'eena sanatan qaala Rabbi awzi'-neee an ashkura ni'matakal lateee an'amta 'alaiyya Wa-'alaa waalidaiya Wa-an a'mala saalihan tardaahu Wa-aslih lee fee zurriyyatee; innee tubtu ilaika Wa-innee minal muslimeen

text: Those are the ones from whom We will accept the best of what they did and overlook their misdeeds, [their being] among the companions of Paradise. [That is] the promise of truth which they had been promised.
tl: Ulaaa'ikal lazeena nata-qabbalu 'anhum ahsana maa 'amiloo Wa-natajaawazu 'an saiyiaatihim feee Ashaabil jannati Wa'das sidqil lazee kaanoo yoo'adoon

text: But one who says to his parents, \"Uff to you; do you promise me that I will be brought forth [from the earth] when generations before me have already passed on [into oblivion]?\" while they call to Allāh for help [and to their son], \"Woe to you! Believe! Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth.\" But he says, \"This is not but legends of the former peoples\" -
tl: Wallazee qaala liwaali-daihi uffil lakumaaa ata'idanineee an ukhraja Wa-qad khalatil quroonu min qablee Wa-humaa yastagheesaanil laaha wailaka aamin inna wa'dal laahi haqq, fa-yaqoolu maa haazaaa illaaa asaateerul awwaleen

text: Those are the ones upon whom the word [i.e., decree] has come into effect, [who will be] among nations which had passed on before them of jinn and men. Indeed, they [all] were losers.
tl: Ulaaa'ikal lazeena haqqa 'alaihimul qawlu feee umamin qad khalat min qablihim minal jinni wal-insi innahum kaanoo khaasireen

text: And for all there are degrees [of reward and punishment] for what they have done, and [it is] so that He may fully compensate them for their deeds, and they will not be wronged.
tl: Wa-likullin darajaatum mimmaa 'amiloo Wa-liyuwaf-fiyahum a'maalahum Wa-hum laa yuzlamoon

text: And the Day those who disbelieved are exposed to the Fire [it will be said], \"You exhausted your pleasures during your worldly life and enjoyed them, so this Day you will be awarded the punishment of [extreme] humiliation because you were arrogant upon the earth without right and because you were defiantly disobedient.\"
tl: Wa-Yawma yu'radul lazeena kafaroo 'alan Naari azhabtum taiyibaatikum fee hayaatikumud dunyaa wastam-ta'tum bihaa fal-Yawma tujzawna 'azaabal hooni bimaa kuntum tastakbiroona fil ardi bighairil haqqi Wa-bimaa kuntum tafsuqoon

text: And mention, [O Muḥammad], the brother of ʿAad, when he warned his people in [the region of] al-Aḥqāf - and warners had already passed on before him and after him - [saying], \"Do not worship except Allāh. Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day.\"
tl: Wazkur akhaa 'Aad, iz anzara qawmahoo bil-Ahqaafi Wa-qad khalatin nuzuru mim baini yadaihi Wa-min khalfiheee allaa ta'budooo illal laaha inneee akhaafu 'alaikum 'azaaba Yawmin 'azeem

text: They said, \"Have you come to delude us away from our gods? Then bring us what you promise us, if you should be of the truthful.\"
tl: Qaaloo aji'tanaa li-taa-fikanaa 'an aalihatinaa fa'tinaa bimaa ta'idunaaa in kunta minas saadiqeen

text: He said, \"Knowledge [of its time] is only with Allāh, and I convey to you that with which I was sent; but I see you [to be] a people behaving ignorantly.\"
tl: Qaala innamal 'ilmu indal laahi Wa-uballighukum maaa ursiltu bihee Wa-laakinneee araakum qawman tajhaloon

text: And when they saw it as a cloud approaching their valleys, they said, \"This is a cloud bringing us rain!\" Rather, it is that for which you were impatient: a wind, within it a painful punishment,
tl: Falammaa ra awhu 'aaridam mustaqbila awdiyatihim qaaloo haazaa 'aaridum mumtirunaa; bal huwa masta'jaltum bihee reehun feehaa 'azaabun aleem

text: Destroying everything by command of its Lord. And they became so that nothing was seen [of them] except their dwellings. Thus do We recompense the criminal people.
tl: Tudammiru kulla shai'im bi-amri Rabbihaa fa-asbahoo laa yuraaa illaa masaakinuhum; kazaalika najzil qawmal mujrimeen

text: And We had certainly established them in such as We have not established you, and We made for them hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]. But their hearing and vision and hearts availed them not from anything [of the punishment] when they were [continually] rejecting the signs of Allāh; and they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
tl: Wa-laqad makkannaahum feemaaa im makkannaakum feehi waj'alnaa lahum sam'anw Wa-absaaranw Wa-af'idatan famaaa aghnaa 'anhum samu'uhum Wa-laaa absaaruhum Wa-laaa af'idatuhum min shai'in iz kaanoo yajhadoona bi-Aayaatil laahi Wa-haaqa bihim maa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

text: And We have already destroyed what surrounds you of [those] cities, and We have diversified the signs [or verses] that perhaps they might return [from disbelief].
tl: Wa-laqad ahlaknaa ma hawlakum minal quraa Wa-sarrafnal Aayaati la'allahum yarji'oon

text: Then why did those they took besides Allāh as deities by which to approach [Him] not aid them? But they had strayed [i.e., departed] from them. And that was their falsehood and what they were inventing.
tl: Falaw-laa nasarahumul lazeenat takhazoo min doonil laahi qurbaanan aalihatam bal dalloo 'anhum' Wa-zaalika ifkuhum Wa-maa kaanoo yaftaroon

text: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when We directed to you a few of the jinn, listening to the Qur’ān. And when they attended it, they said, \"Listen attentively.\" And when it was concluded, they went back to their people as warners.
tl: Wa-iz sarafinaaa ilaika nafaram minal jinni yastami'oonal Quraana falammaa hadaroohu qaalooo ansitoo falammaa qudiya wallaw ilaa qawmihim munzireen

text: They said, \"O our people, indeed we have heard a [recited] Book revealed after Moses confirming what was before it which guides to the truth and to a straight path.
tl: Qaaloo yaa-qawmanaaa innaa sami'naa Kitaaban unzila mim ba'di Moosa musaddiqal limaa baina yadihi yahdeee ilal haqqi Wa-ilaa Tareeqim Mustaqeem

text: O our people, respond to the Caller [i.e., Messenger] of Allāh and believe in him; He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive for you your sins and protect you from a painful punishment.
tl: Yaa-qawmanaaa ajeeboo daa'iyal laahi Wa-aaminoo bihee yaghfir lakum min zunoobikum Wa-yujirkum min 'azaabin aleem

text: But he who does not respond to the Caller of Allāh will not cause failure [to Him] upon earth, and he will not have besides Him any protectors. Those are in manifest error.\"
tl: Wa-mal laa yujib daa'iyal laahi falaisa bimu'jizin fil ardi Wa-laisa lahoo min dooniheee awliyaaa'; ulaaa-ika fee dalaalim mubeen

text: Do they not see that Allāh, who created the heavens and earth and did not fail in their creation, is able to give life to the dead? Yes. Indeed, He is over all things competent.
tl: Awalam yaraw annal laahal lazee khalaqas samaawaati wal-larda Wa-lam ya'ya bikhal qihinna biqaadirin 'alaaa aiyuhyiyal mawtaa; balaaa innahoo 'alaa kulli shai'in Qadeer

text: And the Day those who disbelieved are exposed to the Fire [it will be said], \"Is this not the truth?\" They will say, \"Yes, by our Lord.\" He will say, \"Then taste the punishment for what you used to deny.\"
tl: Wa-Yawma yu'radul lazeena kafaroo 'alan naari alaisa haaza bil-haqq; qaaloo balaa Wa-Rabbinaa; qaala fazooqul 'azaaba bimaa kuntum takfuroon

text: So be patient, [O Muḥammad], as were those of determination among the messengers and do not be impatient for them. It will be - on the Day they see that which they are promised - as though they had not remained [in the world] except an hour of a day. [This is] notification. And will [any] be destroyed except the defiantly disobedient people?
tl: Fasbir kamaa sabara ulul 'azmi minar Rusuli Wa-laa tasta'jil lahum; ka-annahum Yawma yarawna maa yoo'adoona lam yalbasooo illaa saa'atam min nahaar; balaagh; fahal yuhlaku illal qawmul faasiqoon
